title: chamaemelum inodorum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, also known as English chamomile or Roman chamomile, is an annual plant in the daisy family with a long history of use in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Chamaemelum nobile include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, which can be attributed to the presence of apigenin and other flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming this plant include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as soothing digestive issues and easing menstrual cramps. Chamaemelum nobile can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
